chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI ITRA 121 of 2020 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No.125/2020. 2. For hearing of main case. 30.09.2025 Mr. Muhammad Aqeel Qureshi, advocate for the applicant. On 22.01.2021 following order was passed: “22.01.2021 Mr. Muhammad Aqeel Qureshi, advocate for the applicant. Learned counsel for the applicant requests for a short adjournment to reformulate the questions, which were arising from the impugned order passed by the Appellate Tribunal Inland Revenue (Special Bench), Karachi. At his request, two weeks’ time is granted to do the needful.” Today the same counsel appears and made the same request. It appears that the applicant is not interested in present proceedings. Accordingly, in view of judgment of CIR vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, this reference application is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
